subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-05-02 in Bahji
subcodes.first_line: Some assert that the realization of all things, the composition of created beings, and their dissolution proceedeth from interaction, and for this cause they stand in no need of a True Ordainer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی برآنند تحقق اشیاء و ترکیب کائنات و تحلیل منبعث از تفاعل است و بجهت این احتیاج به مدبر حقیقی ندارند
subcodes.subjects: @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @relationship of the soul to the body, @proofs for the existence of God, @law of cause and effect
